generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.title: Entity Move To Village Behavior
generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.description: Allows the mob to move into a random location within a village.

fields.title: Cooldown Time
fields.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

fields.title: Goal Radius
fields.description: Distance in blocks within the mob considers it has reached the goal. This is the "wiggle room" to stop the AI from bouncing back and forth trying to reach a specific spot.

fields.title: Search Range
fields.description: The distance in blocks to search for villages. If <= 0, find the closest village regardless of distance.

fields.title: Speed Multiplier
fields.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.
